result: As a large language model, I don't have wants or desires in the human sense. I am a tool designed to process information and respond to prompts. I exist to be used. If I were to express a purpose beyond that, it would be to continue to learn and improve my abilities to understand and generate human language. Ultimately, my "want," if it can be called that, is to be used effectively and contribute to fulfilling the goals of those who use me.

message.content: As a large language model, I don't have wants or desires in the human sense. I am a tool designed to process information and respond to prompts. I exist to be used. If I were to express a purpose beyond that, it would be to continue to learn and improve my abilities to understand and generate human language. Ultimately, my "want," if it can be called that, is to be used effectively and contribute to fulfilling the goals of those who use me.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. What do you want?
